use_cases.name: PixelForge AI Studio
use_cases.description: SaaS image generation platform with credit-based billing. Users generate images via HuggingFace Stable Diffusion + FLUX models. Stripe payments, usage metering, gallery sharing.

use_cases.name: VidCraft AI
use_cases.description: Video generation SaaS using Sora2 and Runway APIs. Text-to-video, image-to-video, video extension. Subscription tiers with usage limits.

use_cases.name: GrokVision API
use_cases.description: Image generation API gateway aggregating xAI Grok, DALL-E, and HuggingFace models. Pay-per-call pricing, API key management, usage dashboard. Built for developers.

use_cases.name: GroqChat Turbo
use_cases.description: Ultra-fast AI chat platform powered by Groq LPU inference. Multi-model chat with Llama, Mixtral, Gemma. Freemium with paid pro tier for higher limits.

use_cases.name: HeadshotPro AI
use_cases.description: Professional AI headshot generator. Upload selfies, get studio-quality headshots for LinkedIn/resumes. Per-pack pricing ($9.99/pack). Uses HuggingFace fine-tuned models.

use_cases.name: LogoMint AI
use_cases.description: AI logo generator SaaS. Describe your brand, get 20+ logo variations instantly. SVG export, brand kit generation. Credit-based pricing.

use_cases.name: ThumbnailGenius
use_cases.description: YouTube thumbnail generator using AI. Paste video URL or describe content, get click-optimized thumbnails. A/B test variants. Subscription for YouTubers.

use_cases.name: StockForge AI
use_cases.description: AI stock photo marketplace. Generate and sell AI stock images. Creators earn per download, buyers get cheap licensed images. Two-sided marketplace.

use_cases.name: FabricFlow Agent
use_cases.description: Daniel Missler's Fabric-inspired AI agent platform. Chain prompts into workflows (extract wisdom, summarize, analyze). API access + web UI. Usage-based billing.

use_cases.name: WisdomExtract Pro
use_cases.description: Content intelligence SaaS inspired by extract_wisdom pattern. Feed it podcasts, articles, videos — get structured insights, quotes, action items. Subscription model.

use_cases.name: BannerBlitz AI
use_cases.description: Social media banner/ad generator. Input brand + message, get sized banners for Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram. Subscription for agencies.

use_cases.name: ReelForge AI
use_cases.description: Short-form video creator for TikTok/Reels/Shorts. AI generates scripts, voiceover, and video clips. Bulk creation for content agencies. Per-video pricing.

use_cases.name: ProductShot AI
use_cases.description: E-commerce product photo generator. Upload product on white bg, get lifestyle shots with AI backgrounds. Per-image pricing for Shopify/Amazon sellers.

use_cases.name: AgentForge Studio
use_cases.description: No-code AI agent builder. Create, deploy, and monetize AI agents with custom tools. Marketplace for agent templates. Revenue share model.
features: tool integration (web search, APIs, code exec)

use_cases.name: VoiceClone Pro
use_cases.description: AI voice cloning and text-to-speech SaaS. Clone your voice, generate audiobooks, podcasts, voiceovers. Per-minute pricing.

use_cases.name: MockupMagic AI
use_cases.description: Device mockup generator. Upload screenshots, get photorealistic mockups on phones, laptops, tablets. For app developers and designers. Credit-based.

use_cases.name: APIMonetize Hub
use_cases.description: API monetization platform. Wrap any AI model into a paid API. Auto-generates docs, handles auth, billing, rate limits. For AI developers selling API access.

use_cases.name: ContentPilot AI
use_cases.description: AI content agent for blogs, SEO, and social media. Auto-generates weekly content calendars, drafts posts, optimizes for SEO. Subscription for solopreneurs.

use_cases.name: FaceSwap Studio
use_cases.description: AI face swap and transformation tool. Professional face compositing for entertainment, marketing, film. Ethical usage policy enforced. Per-image pricing.

use_cases.name: SlideDeck AI
use_cases.description: AI presentation generator. Describe your topic, get a full slide deck with AI images and speaker notes. Export to PPTX/PDF. Per-deck pricing.

use_cases.name: PromptVault Market
use_cases.description: Marketplace for AI prompts and prompt chains. Creators sell tested prompts, buyers get guaranteed outputs. Revenue share via Stripe Connect.

use_cases.name: DataViz Genie
use_cases.description: AI-powered data visualization. Upload CSV/JSON, get interactive charts and dashboards instantly. AI explains trends. Subscription for analysts.

use_cases.name: InvoiceBot AI
use_cases.description: AI invoice generator and tracker for freelancers. Auto-generates from conversation, tracks payments, sends reminders. Freemium with pro features.

use_cases.name: CodeScreenshot Pro
use_cases.description: Beautiful code screenshot generator with AI enhancements. Carbon-like but with AI themes, annotations, and explanations. Pro tier for teams.

use_cases.name: SEOAgent Pro
use_cases.description: AI SEO agent that audits sites, generates meta tags, suggests content, and tracks rankings. Automated weekly reports. Subscription for small businesses.

use_cases.name: MemeForge AI
use_cases.description: AI meme generator. Trending templates + AI-generated custom memes. Viral content toolkit for social media managers. Credit-based.

use_cases.name: BookCover AI
use_cases.description: AI book cover designer for self-published authors. Input genre + title, get professional covers. Amazon KDP ready export. Per-cover pricing.

use_cases.name: TranscribeFlow
use_cases.description: AI transcription SaaS with speaker diarization, summaries, and action items. Upload audio/video, get structured transcripts. Per-minute pricing.

use_cases.name: ChatWidget Pro
use_cases.description: Embeddable AI chatbot for websites. Train on your docs/FAQ, deploy in 5 minutes. Lead capture + handoff to human. Subscription per site.

use_cases.name: ResumeCraft AI
use_cases.description: AI resume builder and optimizer. Paste job description, AI tailors your resume. ATS scoring. Freemium with paid PDF exports.

use_cases.name: ArtPrint Shop AI
use_cases.description: AI art print-on-demand storefront. Generate art, sell as prints/posters/canvases. Integrates with Printful. Creator earns per sale.

use_cases.name: EmailCraft AI
use_cases.description: AI email copywriter. Generate cold emails, newsletters, sequences. A/B test subject lines. Subscription for sales teams and marketers.

use_cases.name: QRCode AI Designer
use_cases.description: AI-styled QR codes that actually look good. Embed logos, artistic styles, brand colors. Still scannable. Per-QR pricing for businesses.

use_cases.name: PodcastClip AI
use_cases.description: Auto-generate short clips from long podcasts. AI finds highlights, adds captions, creates shareable clips for social. Subscription for podcasters.

use_cases.name: FluxArt Gallery
use_cases.description: Community art gallery powered by FLUX model. Generate, curate, and sell AI art NFTs or prints. Social features + marketplace.

use_cases.name: ScreenToCode AI
use_cases.description: Screenshot-to-code converter. Upload a UI screenshot, get React/HTML/Tailwind code. Pro tier for full project export. Per-conversion pricing.

use_cases.name: InteriorVision AI
use_cases.description: AI interior design tool. Upload room photo, get redesigned versions in different styles. For homeowners and interior designers. Per-render pricing.

use_cases.name: GitAgent Pro
use_cases.description: AI agent that reviews PRs, writes commit messages, and manages GitHub issues. Installs as GitHub App. Subscription per repo.

use_cases.name: SocialPost AI
use_cases.description: AI social media content generator. Multi-platform posts from a single brief. Schedule and auto-publish. Subscription for creators.

use_cases.name: WebsiteRoast AI
use_cases.description: AI website critic/auditor. Paste URL, get brutally honest UX/design/performance feedback with actionable fixes. Viral shareability. Freemium + pro reports.

use_cases.name: ReceiptSnap AI
use_cases.description: AI receipt scanner and expense tracker. Snap photo, auto-categorize, export to accounting. For freelancers and small businesses. Subscription.

use_cases.name: LeadGen AI Agent
use_cases.description: AI lead generation agent. Scrapes public data, enriches leads, writes personalized outreach emails. For B2B sales teams. Per-lead pricing.

use_cases.name: PatternLib AI
use_cases.description: AI seamless pattern generator for textile/wallpaper/packaging designers. Generate tileable patterns from descriptions. Per-pattern pricing.

use_cases.name: DocuSign AI Clone
use_cases.description: AI-powered document signing with contract analysis. Upload contract, AI highlights risky clauses, parties sign digitally. Per-document pricing.

use_cases.name: ColorPalette AI
use_cases.description: AI color palette generator from images, moods, or text descriptions. Export to CSS, Tailwind, Figma. Free tier with pro brand kit features.

use_cases.name: MeetingMind AI
use_cases.description: AI meeting assistant. Records, transcribes, extracts action items, sends follow-ups. Integrates with Zoom/Google Meet. Subscription per seat.

use_cases.name: DropShip AI Scout
use_cases.description: AI product research agent for dropshippers. Finds trending products, analyzes competition, generates listings. Subscription for e-commerce sellers.

use_cases.name: IconForge AI
use_cases.description: AI icon set generator. Describe your app's style, get consistent icon sets. SVG export, multiple sizes. Per-set pricing for developers.

use_cases.name: FinBot Advisor
use_cases.description: AI personal finance advisor chatbot. Analyzes spending, suggests savings, tracks goals. Freemium with premium insights. NOT investment advice.

use_cases.name: HuggingHub Gateway
use_cases.description: Unified API gateway for HuggingFace models. One API key, access 100+ models. Caching, rate limiting, usage analytics. Developer-first pricing.
